title: Heap Allocation Contracts and Failure Handling · Memory Trace: Sized Free C23
summary: A batch importer assumes allocation succeeds and treats zero-byte requests differently across supported C libraries. Planned artifact: Add and verify the cmem sized free c23 increment in allocation wrapper with explicit outcomes. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
